title: Dancing Jevil Totem (animated)
description: this little guy will sit dancing in your offhand or mainhand, joyfully watching you struggling to survive and letting you live when you do inevitably die
body:
this little guy will sit dancing in your offhand or mainhand, joyfully watching you struggling to survive and letting you live when you do inevitably die

hope you like this epic little man!!! i wont colour this because it looks horrid in jevil's normal purple and black clothing
